title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 354.125 - Corporation not liable for injuries resulting from medical services rendered members
text:
354.125.  Corporation not liable for injuries resulting from medical services rendered members. — A health services corporation shall not be liable for injuries resulting from neglect, misfeasance, malfeasance or malpractice on the part of any person, organization, agency or corporation rendering health services to the health services corporation's members and beneficiaries.
(L. 1973 S.B. 3 § 24)
